invalidFileTypeDesc: Please upload a valid JSON file.

renameNovelDialogDesc: Enter a new name for your novel.
confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the novel "{{novelName}}" and all its data.

documentModalDescription: Upload your manuscript as a Word (.docx) or PDF file, or download your novel in either format. Downloads use KDP 6x9 formatting.
documentImportNote: Note: Imported text is shown as a preview. Use 'Apply to Novel' to add this content.
documentImportApplySuccess: Successfully applied imported text to a new act.
betaReaderNoFeedbackYet: Select a persona and click the button to get feedback on your manuscript.
settingsFontSettingsDescription: Customise the font used in the writing editor.
settingsAiFeaturesDescription: Enable or disable AI-powered features across the app.
settingsAiFeaturesToggleDescription: Enables AI assistant panels, beta reader, and analysis tools.
settingsAiFeaturesHiddenMessage: AI features are currently hidden. Enable them in the Appearance tab.
settingsAiEndpointConfigDescription: Configure the AI API endpoints for Manuscript Oracle.
settingsAiPromptsDescription: Customise the prompts used for each AI task.
settingsGlobalSystemPromptDescription: This prompt is prepended to all AI requests.
settingsConfirmDeleteProfileDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{{profileName}}"? This cannot be undone.
settingsConfirmResetPromptsDescription: This will reset all AI task prompts to their defaults. This cannot be undone.
settingsAboutAppDescription: Your publishing house AI: whole-manuscript analysis, AI beta readers, and more.
themeEditorMainDescription: Customise the look and feel of Manuscript Oracle.
novelOverviewDescription: Edit your novel details and settings.
novelOverviewPlaceholderPov: e.g., First Person, Third Person Limited

novelOverviewAiContextErrorDataNotLoaded: Novel data is not yet loaded.
novelOverviewJoyrideStepWelcome: Welcome to Manuscript Oracle! Let me show you around.
novelOverviewJoyrideStepPlanTab: Use the Plan tab to structure your novel with acts, chapters, and scenes.

novelOverviewJoyrideStepConceptsTabMobil: Use the Concepts tab to manage characters, locations, and other story elements.
novelOverviewJoyrideStepConceptsTabDeskt: Use the Concepts panel on the right to manage characters, locations, and other story elements.
novelOverviewJoyrideStepSettingsTab: Use the Settings tab to configure AI endpoints and prompts.
novelOverviewJoyrideStepAiFeatures: Use the AI features to get suggestions for your synopsis and more.
